violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as juices) in the dairy cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the walk-in cooler area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fans have an accumulation of dust and biofilm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The ceiling tiles in the retail floor area is in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
